falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (previous 2024 peak) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a bullish breakout invalidating the 'hold' signal and suggesting a new uptrend phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Directly contradicts the 'hold' signal by introducing aggressive monetary stimulus that would typically drive markets higher

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score reaches 70+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Exceeds the current blowoff threshold, indicating a confirmed bubble phase that invalidates the 'unknown' verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
